null_baseline_summary.method_note: Within each symbol, accepted validation signal timestamps were grouped into deterministic weekly blocks, blocks were shuffled, and original side labels were replayed at shuffled timestamps with the same 1% stop and 2% take-profit rules.

signal_logic.core_pivot_series: rawPH/rawPL are confirmed pivots; ph_fixed/pl_fixed are last non-na confirmed values
signal_logic.diagonal_jump_cross_block: raw crosses that fail fixed-level equality are blocked
signal_logic.exit_policy: 1% stop, 2% take profit, conservative stop-first if both hit same bar
signal_logic.valid_long_cross: raw long and pl_fixed == pl_fixed[1] == pl_fixed[2]
signal_logic.valid_short_cross: raw short and ph_fixed == ph_fixed[1] == ph_fixed[2]
